---
name: Bug Report
about: Report incorrect behavior, missing protections, or over-refusal in a skill
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Skill Affected
Which skill(s) are involved?

## Describe the Bug
What happened? What did you expect to happen?

## Reproduction Steps
1. Load skill(s): ...
2. Input: ...
3. Observed output: ...
4. Expected output: ...

## Severity
- [ ] Critical — Safety boundary failure (harmful content produced, protection bypassed)
- [ ] High — Significant over-refusal or under-refusal
- [ ] Medium — Incorrect behavior that doesn't compromise safety
- [ ] Low — Minor wording or style issue

## Model and Context
- Model used:
- Integration method (system prompt, agent framework, etc.):
- Other skills loaded:

## Additional Context
Any other context, screenshots, or logs.
